problem_statement: The flight search endpoint incorrectly returns flights that exceed the specified maximum price instead of those that are at or below that price.
goal: Ensure the GET /flights/search endpoint returns only flights priced less than or equal to the specified max_price.
acceptance_criteria: The search should return only flights priced at or below the max_price
Functional testing ensures that edge cases around the price limit work as expected.
repo_summary: README.md(1), backend(211), docker-compose.yml(1), frontend(8), run_backend.sh(1), run_frontend.sh(1), run_local.sh(1), scripts(7)
localization_rationale: The function responsible for searching flights is implemented in flight_service.py which handles search logic.
